metadata.title: BlackboardEntry — constitutional coordination ledger row contract

description: Whole-row contract for the BlackboardEntry ORM class (src/shared/infrastructure/database/models/workers.py). The blackboard is the sole inter-worker communication channel; every worker interaction produces a row here. entry_type governs the semantic family (finding, claim, proposal, report, heartbeat); payload is JSONB and carries family-specific fields not governed at the class level. __tablename__ and __table_args__ are SQLAlchemy ClassVar metaclass attributes declared as AnnAssign nodes in the class body; they are included in properties to prevent false-positive undeclared-field findings. Payload sub-contracts (worker_heartbeat, worker_error, run_complete families) are deferred — raw dict literals in worker base.py are not governable via the current AST gate. The three Finding surfaces (CheckResult, AuditFinding, BlackboardEntry entry_type='finding') are governed by Finding.json; adding BlackboardEntry to Finding.json governed_classes is deferred pending governor decision. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1 Session 3.

__tablename__.description: SQLAlchemy ClassVar — table name declaration. Not a data field; included to suppress false-positive undeclared-field findings from the AST gate.

__table_args__.description: SQLAlchemy ClassVar — table arguments (schema, constraints). Not a data field; included to suppress false-positive undeclared-field findings from the AST gate.

id.description: Primary key UUID. Server-generated via gen_random_uuid().

worker_uuid.description: UUID of the worker that posted this entry. NOT NULL. ADR-011: only Workers may INSERT blackboard entries; worker_uuid provides the attribution trail.

entry_type.description: Semantic family of this entry. Governed vocabulary: blackboard_entry_type enum in .intent/META/enums.json (ADR-056 D5). Values: finding, claim, proposal, report, heartbeat.

phase.description: Lifecycle phase in which this entry was posted. Governed vocabulary: phase enum. Values: audit, runtime, execution.

status.description: Current workflow state of the entry. Server default: open. Governed vocabulary: blackboard_entry_status enum (9 values per ADR-045 and issue #263): open, claimed, awaiting_reaudit, resolved, abandoned, deferred_to_proposal, dry_run_complete, indeterminate, suppressed.

subject.description: What this entry is about. Governed vocabulary start: blackboard_subject enum in .intent/META/enums.json (ADR-056 D5). Subject is the primary join key for consequence-chain queries (ADR-015, ADR-017).

payload.description: Entry-specific structured data (JSONB). Shape varies by entry_type and subject. Payload sub-contracts for worker_heartbeat, worker_error, and run_complete families are deferred (no Python dataclasses exist for these shapes).

claimed_by.description: UUID of the worker that claimed this entry (UUID | None). Non-null only when status is claimed. Set atomically with status transition per ADR-011.

claimed_at.description: Timestamp when this entry was claimed (datetime | None).

resolved_at.description: Timestamp when this entry reached a terminal status (datetime | None). NULL resolved_at on terminal-status rows is historical governance debt (28,287 rows, Band C).

created_at.description: Row creation timestamp. NOT NULL, server default now().

updated_at.description: Row last-update timestamp. NOT NULL, server default now().

allOf.description: CLAIMED: claimed_by must be non-null when status is claimed. Enforced at the write boundary by the claim atomic action (ADR-011).
HEARTBEAT: entry_type=heartbeat entries are always posted with status=resolved. Enforced by post_heartbeat() in worker base class.
FINDING: entry_type=finding entries are always posted with status=open. Enforced by post_finding() in worker base class.
